title: LRC - JUIT
content: Digital Library Digital Library is an Institutional Repository of JUIT. It has been developed on DSpace Open Source Software. It contains scanned copy of previous years question papers, full-text of articles published under JUIT affiliation. It can be accessed at http://www.ir.juit.ac.in:8080/jspui/ Related Links e-Books@UGC Portal AICTE e-Kumbh Portal Abhilekh Patal Web Portal WebOPAC (KOHA) Digital Library (Institutional Repository) Library Guidelines for Submitting Theses & Project Reports JUIT Publications Information Search Request Form E-Resources (On Campus) E-Resources (Off Campus) Research Articles Request Form Print Journals New Arrivals Hilly Ramblings You Said it We Did it NPTEL (Home Page) NPTEL (Campus Access) NDL Shodhganga Delnet
